summary.title: Add newly discovered CSAM hash cluster
summary.motivation: Citizen reviewers and moderators flagged recurring uploads referencing the same digest family across two operators.
summary.expected_impact: Quarantining this family prevents known abusive media from resurfacing while appeals are processed.
